task: Move the green cloth to the right of the can
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A green cloth lies on a wooden surface. A red container with an orange rim is to the left, and a gray cylindrical can is to the right. The green cloth is a flat, rectangular textile. STRATEGY - The task is to move the green cloth to the right of the can. This requires grasping the cloth, transporting it, and placing it in the target area. Failure modes include dropping the cloth during transport or placing it incorrectly. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the green cloth at its body for a stable grasp. Step 2: Grasp the cloth at its body to lift it. Step 3: Transport the cloth to the right of the can. Step 4: Place the cloth on the surface to the right of the can.

**Goal:** on(green_cloth, surface_right_of_can); stable(green_cloth)
**Scene:** green_cloth, red_container, gray_can, wooden_surface
**Step 1:** reach(green_cloth)
  affordance_region: the body of the green cloth
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_cloth, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_cloth) < 0.03
**Step 2:** grasp(green_cloth)
  affordance_region: the body of the green cloth
  contact: holding(green_cloth) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_cloth)
**Step 3:** transport(green_cloth -> surface_right_of_can)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the wooden surface to the right of the gray_can
  spatial: above(green_cloth, surface_right_of_can, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_cloth)
  done_when: above(green_cloth, surface_right_of_can, 0.05)
**Step 4:** place(green_cloth -> surface_right_of_can)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the wooden surface to the right of the gray_can
  contact: surface_contact(green_cloth, surface_right_of_can) [completion]; released(green_cloth) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_cloth) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_cloth, surface_right_of_can) AND released(green_cloth)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the green cloth
the body of the green cloth
an empty area on the wooden surface to the right of the gray_can
an empty area on the wooden surface to the right of the gray_can
